titleStmt.title: SII 24.95: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 95. (A.R. No. 129 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records sale of land in Rājamahēndra-vaḷanāḍu to Mādhavaṉ Tiruvaraṅgadēvaṉ alias Adaḷaiyūrnāḍāḻvāṉ of Kaḍuvaṅguḍi by the temple executives for supply of specified quantity of paddy to the temple. The record is dated in the 41st year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻ[ n=ta puviyil] ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayar munaik kontaḷa varaicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticai temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannilappāvait tanimaiyun tavira vantu punitaṟṟiru maṇimakuṭam Uraimaiyir cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peṟukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa kam
Eṅkaṇun tantu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruvil puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅ kiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaikkiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulap piṟaipol niṟpiḻai Ennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallata naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅka pattiraiyaḷavum veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Ēṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta netikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭa ticai tannāṭukantu tānun run
tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantayariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaik koṇṭu Īṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭiya maṇṭalam koḷḷattiruvuḷḷat parittaraṅkamum ṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu pol tan peruñceṉaiyai poruta po(pa)rkkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñ curameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampam ticai to ri
paṭumaiyyaccayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāyveṟellān tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutaniṟṟalaivarai kuṟukular kulaiyak koṭṭā ruṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟai koḷ ḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkamum viḷaṅkap pār toḻac civaniṭattumaiyenat tiyākavalli hāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna tripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolāttuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 1 Āvatu raājamahendra vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār ko
Āḻvār kanmikaḷil śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyañ ceykiṟa nālūr tirunāṭuṭaiyā nampiyum tiruveṅkaṭappiccarum Olikonṟai śrīvayiṣṇavanampiyum tiruvaraṅkattamutinārum śrīpaṇ ṭāravāriyam Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkanum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutu kāśyapan taniiḷañciṅkamum sabhaikaṇakku nānūṟṟuvappiriyanum civayiṣṇavappiriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa kanmikaḷom rājādhi rājavaḷanāṭṭu ḷūr nāṭṭuk kaṭuvankuṭik kaṭuvaṅkuṭaiyān mātavan tiruvaraṅkatevan Ataḷaiyūr nāṭāḻvārkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuramāna rājamahe ntravaḷanāṭṭu
nūṟu samvatsaram payircceyya Uṇṇātu kiṭanta nilattu Ivarkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku Icainta kiḻpārkellai yum vīra kum tenpāṟkellai Anpan viḷākattu vaṭakkum melpāṟke tukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai taṇṭuṟai nīrpāyum vākkālukku vaṭakkum Icainta peru ppaṭṭa nilam I pa Araiyey Orumāvum meṟpaṭiyūril payircceyya viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattu Icainta kiḻpārkkellai veḷārvaḷāka ṭai ṭai Arai
kkālukkum Atin kiḻai vāykkālukkum melpāṟkellai tirumārviṭaṅkoṇṭa vaā y(ā)kkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Uttamacoḻap perāṟṟukku teṟkum Iv vicainta perunānkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam 2pa Iraṇṭu māvum Āka nilam ya munṟu māvukkum Āḻvār śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkina kācu Araiyey Iraṇṭu māvukkum Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu Innilam Arai yey Iraṇṭumā taṟattirutti tiruttaṟṟa nilattukku puncai varicai cipaṇṭārattu paḷḷikoṇṭān marak Innilamaraiyey munṟumāvukkum Icaḷa- (1/4)3 10 9 ṭavanākavum Epperppaṭṭatu
m ceyyakkaṭavarallātārākavum tiruttaṟṟa nilattukkum puncai varicai koṇṭu Ivar ceyvikkiṟa tirunan=tavanam tirunāṭuṭaiyān kellai Āyiratteṇpaṟkku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai śrīcaṭakopadāsa ttukku vaṭakkum kellai kkum vaṭapāṟkellai cuttamalikku teṟkum Ivvicain=ta peru māvum tirunāṭuṭaiyāntirunan=tavanañ ceyyum peru dāsanum Ivan vaṟkattārume ṭaiveṭṭiyu
m maṟṟum tiruvācalil pon=ta kuṭimai maṟṟepperppaṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭavarallā tārākavum Ippaṭi rākavum viṟṟukkuṭuttom kaṭuvankuṭiyān mātavan tiruvaraṅkatevan Ippaṭikkuk koyilkkaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ārāvamutu villiyān patineṭṭu nāṭṭu riyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku koyil kaṇakku nānūṟṟuppiriyan Ārāvamutineḻuttu
Ippaṭikku IḷañciṅkattineContinuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
